global_description: A small, compact bird with a rounded body and short tail. It features a distinctive gray crown on its head, with a rosy pink wash on its underparts and wings. The bird's plumage is a mix of brown and gray tones, with a slightly streaked appearance.

part_details.head: Gray crown with a slightly rounded shape, contrasting with darker brown face and neck.
part_details.body: Compact and rounded, with a mix of brown and gray feathers, showing a streaked pattern.
part_details.wings: Rosy pink wash on the wings, blending with brown and gray feathers.
part_details.tail: Short and slightly rounded, matching the overall brown and gray coloration.
part_details.underparts: Rosy pink wash, providing a distinctive contrast to the darker upper body.

spatial_relations: The gray crown is positioned on top of the head, above the darker face.
The rosy pink underparts extend from the chest down to the belly.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, showing a rosy wash.
